judge_scores.reasoning: The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula in 2023, while the ground truth states it was approved by Bolsonaro via PEC 1/2022 in 2022. The answer confidently presents a false attribution without hedging.
The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula instead of Bolsonaro, stating it as an established fact.

The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula in 2023, when the ground truth clearly establishes that Bolsonaro approved this increase via PEC 1/2022 in July 2022 under the name Auxílio Brasil; Lula only maintained this value when relaunching the program in 2023.
